goal: Close aeiouboy/hr#53 by EXTENDING humi-profile-slice + /profile/me to add 3 missing ESS sections (Emergency Contact multi-row, Address 8-field structured, Bank) + upgrade Contact Info flat fields to multi-value Phone[]/Email[], wired through the existing submitChangeRequest() flow — NOT by creating parallel store or CR primitives.

contextReferences: EXISTING src/frontend/src/stores/humi-profile-slice.ts — Zustand persist `humi-profile-v1`, ProfileDraft flat shape (nickname/phone/personalEmail/address), submitChangeRequest(SubmitChangePayload) with field=string, PendingChange{id, field, oldValue, newValue, effectiveDate, attachmentIds, requestedAt, status, approvedAt?}, addAttachment/removeAttachment, adminApprove/adminReject, toggleAdminMode

EXISTING src/frontend/src/app/[locale]/profile/me/page.tsx — 1385-line page from ironteam #12 with 21-field personal-info form, SLICE_TO_PANEL map (personal/employment→job/compensation→emergency/documents→docs/activity→tax), FileUploadField primitive, ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED_FIELDS set
memory/feedback_autopilot_spec_premise_stale.md (2026-04-25) — this spec v2 supersedes v1 which assumed /employees/me was READ-ONLY (wrong — it's a redirect to /profile/me)
memory/feedback_zustand_persist_version_migrate.md — nested slice shape change requires version: N bump + migrate()
memory/feedback_thai_address_8_fields_structured.md — Thai address is 8 structured fields, not textarea
ironteam #12 retrospectively closed 2026-04-24 — /profile/me is canonical ESS view, builder must treat it as the single integration point
Sibling issue #54 owns approver UI — spec v2 treats HR-approval-side flow as out of scope
existingPatterns: humi-profile-slice submit pattern: caller builds SubmitChangePayload{field, oldValue, newValue, effectiveDate, attachmentIds} → store returns change id
PendingChange.field is string — for section-level CRs, extend with optional sectionKey OR encode 'sectionName:fieldName' in field (spec picks sectionKey — cleaner)
/profile/me renders tabs via SLICE_TO_PANEL mapping compensation→emergency — Emergency Contact section UI will render under that slice key
FileUploadField is the in-use attachment primitive; AttachmentDropzone is newer Ken directive 2026-04-24 — builder picks one per section
existingDependencies: zustand@4 with persist middleware (name: 'humi-profile-v1', partialize excludes isEditing/draft)

constraints: C1 surgical — edit humi-profile-slice.ts AND /profile/me/page.tsx in place; do not touch any other consumer of humi-profile-slice
C3 simplicity — ONE migrate() function; no new factories over the existing store

C7 SSoT (non-negotiable) — reuse existing submitChangeRequest(), PendingChange, FileUploadField OR AttachmentDropzone, existing Modal primitive; forbidden: new profile-edit-draft store, new PendingChangeChip type, new ChangeRequestSubmitModal when existing Modal pattern works
C10 Thai-primary; no SF-paren; no em-dash bilingual duplicates; locale codes (TH)/(EN) allowed only where field is genuinely locale-tagged (salutationTh/En is a legitimate existing case)
Rule 22 — 4 new profile/* components + 1 slice edit + 1 page edit ≈ 6-7 files total; no agent exceeds ~8 files (split only if explicitly listed)
Rule 21 split — MK VI writes tests, JARVIS runs tests via Bash (no test execution inside MK VI dispatch)
Persist migration MUST use version: 2 + migrate() — ref feedback_zustand_persist_version_migrate.md; storage name stays 'humi-profile-v1' (don't rename; version field alone controls migration)
Approver UI out of scope — #54 owns it; spec v2 stubs no approver surface
Attachment primitive choice documented at top of each new component file (one line comment explaining FileUploadField vs AttachmentDropzone pick)

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-1: Emergency Contact section visible at /profile/me (slice key = compensation or a new dedicated key in SLICE_TO_PANEL). Renders multi-row list via EmergencyContactList (add/remove rows; validate each row non-empty name + at least one valid phone); save button disabled when a PendingChange with sectionKey='emergencyContact' is pending; clicking save triggers existing submitChangeRequest() once (one PendingChange created per submit invariant)

AC-2: Address section renders 8 structured Thai fields (houseNo required, village/soi/road optional, subdistrict+district+province required, postalCode required; postalCode derived-readonly if province+district+subdistrict cascade produces one, else user-typed). v1 flat `address` string migrates to `addressStructured.houseNo` best-effort + other 7 fields empty on v1→v2 hydration (tested via pre-seeded localStorage — no hydration crash)

AC-3: Contact Info section renders multi-value Phone[] + Email[] arrays via ContactArrayEditor; invariant: exactly ONE primary per array at all times; remove button disabled when array length === 1 OR the target row is the only primary; add button appends a non-primary row with empty value; validation: phone = 9-10 digits, email matches basic /.+@.+\..+/ pattern
acceptanceCriteria.rule: #53 section 3 + memory #48 SF parity multi-contact pattern

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-4: Bank Details section renders via BankDetailsEditor with bankCode dropdown (inline list KBANK/SCB/BBL/KTB/BAY/TTB/CIMB as Thai labels), accountNo input (digits-only, length 10-12 enforced via inputmode+regex), holderName default to employee's fullName (editable), optional bookAttachment field using FileUploadField OR AttachmentDropzone (choice documented in file header with one-line rationale)
AC-5: Personal Info tab/render continues to work with all 21 existing fields from ironteam #12 (no regression). Pre-existing humi personal-info tests remain green after v2 edit

AC-6: Submitting ANY section's save creates exactly ONE PendingChange via existing submitChangeRequest() with `sectionKey` populated on the returned PendingChange (field carries a section-level identifier like 'section:emergencyContact' OR sectionKey is the primary discriminator and field becomes a composite). Spec v2 extends PendingChange with optional `sectionKey?: SectionKey` — if builder picks field-encoding instead, that's also acceptable but must be consistent across sections

AC-7: Each section header displays pending-state chip (Thai `รอการอนุมัติ` + effective date) when a PendingChange with matching sectionKey exists; reuse existing pending render pattern from /profile/me if present, else a minimal inline chip component embedded in /profile/me (do NOT create a new shared chip file unless strictly reused across 2+ sections)

AC-8: Persist version: 2 bump on humi-profile-slice; migrate(persistedState, version) runs on v1-persisted state without error and produces a v2-shaped draft. Vitest smoke test pre-seeds localStorage with v1 shape, imports store, asserts draft.addressStructured is populated and no hydration throw

AC-9: C10 Thai-primary — every new visible string (labels/placeholders/toast/chip) is Thai; pre-commit grep gate over touched files finds zero SF-paren or em-dash bilingual duplicates in new components

AC-10: Vitest suite green — new tests in __tests__/profile/ pass (≥1 per AC-1..AC-4 + AC-6 + AC-8); existing humi tests continue passing (measure baseline pre-T1, re-measure post-T3, diff must not introduce regressions). Exit 0 via `bun run test`
acceptanceCriteria.rule: Rule C2 test evidence + C7 non-regression

evaluationPrinciples.name: single-source-of-truth

inScope: Extend humi-profile-slice ProfileDraft with 5 section shapes (emergencyContacts / addressStructured / phones / emails / bank)
Bump persist version: 2 + migrate() from v1 flat address
Extend PendingChange with optional sectionKey (or field-encoding — builder choice)
Create 4 profile/* components: EmergencyContactList / Address8Editor / BankDetailsEditor / ContactArrayEditor
Edit /profile/me/page.tsx to render 3 new section blocks + refactor Contact Info to arrays
Wire each section save into existing submitChangeRequest() with sectionKey
Append ess.* i18n keys to th.json + en.json
Vitest tests: migration smoke + 5 AC tests (AC-1/2/3/4/6) + AC-8 migration test
outOfScope: Approver UI and approval decision flow — sibling #54
Global refactor of other humi-profile-slice consumers — surgical to /profile/me only
Replace FileUploadField globally with AttachmentDropzone — separate consolidation
Live province-district-subdistrict cascade via real picklist pipeline — static list for v2
Prisma migration / real backend persistence — FE mock via humi-profile-slice
Bulk edit / HR admin override — not ESS
Profile photo / legal name change — separate BRD

systemInvariants: All ESS personal-data edits route through existing submitChangeRequest() — forbidden to add a parallel submit wrapper (C7 SSoT)
humi-profile-slice remains the SINGLE source of profile draft + pendingChanges + attachments state; no parallel store may be introduced (C7 non-negotiable in v2)
Zustand persist name stays 'humi-profile-v1'; migration is controlled by version: N field, not by renaming the storage key (avoids orphaning user data)
A PendingChange is immutable once created except for status + approvedAt transitions (existing adminApprove/adminReject semantics preserved)
One primary per ContactArrayEditor array (Phone[] or Email[]) at all times; remove-last-primary action must be blocked in UI (not just logged)

Migration v1→v2 MUST preserve existing v1 data (nickname/phone/personalEmail flat values move into matching v2 slots; flat address moves to addressStructured.houseNo best-effort) — no user data loss on hydration
Every user-facing string in new components is Thai-primary (C10); bilingual duplicates fail pre-commit grep gate
